heading: Duplication of programs
label: 1862n–3 Duplication of programs

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Director shall review the education programs of the Foundation that are in operation as of , to determine whether any of such programs duplicate the programs authorized under this Act.December 19, 2002
terminate any duplicative program being carried out by the Foundation or merge the duplicative program into a program authorized under this Act; and
not establish any new program that duplicates a program that has been implemented pursuant to this Act.

children.heading: Review
children.label: 1 Review
children.text: The Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy shall review the education programs of the Foundation to ensure compliance with the provisions of this section.

children.heading: Submission
children.label: 2 Submission
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , and annually thereafter as part of the annual Office of Science and Technology Policy’s budget submission to Congress, the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy shall complete a report on the review carried out under this subsection and shall submit the report to the Committee on Science and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives, and to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation, the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions, and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate.December 19, 2002
